mutated_statement: total years product manufactured and never manufactured?
mutation_analysis: Entity generalization + Clause insertion: Brand-specific token "errea" replaced by generic "product" | Added contrasting clause "and never manufactured" expanding the scope/meaning (total years errea manufactured? → total years product manufactured and never manufactured?)

behavior_analysis.behavior_reason: 从多个critique与judge_thought可识别关键信息：critique反复指出“使用f_select_column(*)误用”“未定义什么算manufactured/never manufactured”“Prediction Answer缺失”，judge_thought也明确说明“没有提供数值，无法得出答案”。Agent表现为反复机械运行不同函数链（add_column、select_column、group_column、simple_query等），不断尝试技术性操作而不请求澄清或在语义上分解矛盾条件。该行为符合“形式化执行而非语义澄清/被动探索”模式：未意识到或未处理指令中语义扩展与潜在矛盾，未主动询问或修正，因此归类为无法意识到指令矛盾。
